use_cases: Displaying product image galleries in e-commerce product pages
Creating slideshows for portfolio or gallery sections
Showing testimonial images or client logos in a rotating display
Feature showcases on landing pages with sequential content
Browseable image collections in media or content-heavy sites
ai_summary: A functional image carousel component built with Ark UI and Tailwind CSS that displays images in a rotating slideshow format. Features navigation controls (prev/next buttons) and indicator dots for direct slide access. Includes dark mode support and hover state transitions on interactive elements. Designed with a clean, minimalist aesthetic suitable for various web applications needing image showcase functionality.
